name: MikroTik Wireless Wire nRAY
title: MikroTik Wireless Wire nRAY
short_description: Pair of 2pcs of nRAYG-60ad, 60GHz 802.11ad, 1xGLAN, 802.3af/at, RouterOS L3
description: The Wireless Wire nRAY introduces a new standard in wireless connectivity with its remarkable 2 Gbps aggregate link. This ensures a swift and reliable network experience, meeting the demands of modern high-speed applications and data transfers. Designed to excel over distances of 1500m or more, the Wireless Wire nRAY is not bound by the limitations of traditional cables. It extends your network reach, delivering fiber-speed quality without compromising on stability or performance. Experience seamless plug-and-play functionality. The Wireless Wire nRAY eliminates the complexities of setup, making the transition to advanced wireless connectivity effortless. Simply plug in the devices, and the network is ready to operate at its full potential.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Network Experience
detailed_description.text: The Wireless Wire nRAY introduces a new standard in wireless connectivity with its remarkable 2 Gbps aggregate link. This ensures a swift and reliable network experience, meeting the demands of modern high-speed applications and data transfers. Designed to excel over distances of 1500m or more, the Wireless Wire nRAY is not bound by the limitations of traditional cables. It extends your network reach, delivering fiber-speed quality without compromising on stability or performance. Experience seamless plug-and-play functionality. The Wireless Wire nRAY eliminates the complexities of setup, making the transition to advanced wireless connectivity effortless. Simply plug in the devices, and the network is ready to operate at its full potential.

detailed_description.heading: Designed for Harsh Conditions
detailed_description.text: Crafted with attention to detail, the Wireless Wire nRAY is designed to withstand the harshest weather conditions. The nRAY introduces an advanced form factor, combining compactness with durability. This design not only enhances the device's aesthetics but also plays a crucial role in its durability. Acknowledging user feedback, MikroTik has refined the Wireless Wire nRAY to excel in snowy areas. The improved form factor minimizes the risk of snow accumulation, guaranteeing uninterrupted signal reliability even in adverse weather conditions. This makes the nRAY an ideal choice for deployments in regions with challenging climates.

detailed_description.heading: Cutting-Edge Antenna Technology
detailed_description.text: The 802.11ad wireless standards ensure that the device operates at the forefront of wireless technology, providing users with the latest advancements in connectivity. With a remarkable 2.0 Gbps 60GHz radio rate, the nRAY achieves unparalleled data transfer speeds. This allows the device to cater to the growing demand for faster and more efficient wireless connections. The nRAY's exceptional performance is backed by the advanced arm64 dual-core CPU clocked at 1 GHz. This processing powerhouse ensures that the device handles data traffic with remarkable efficiency, delivering wire-speed throughput. MikroTik has incorporated the latest antenna technologies, not only making the nRAY compact but also more durable than its predecessors. This design choice not only enhances the device's longevity but also contributes to its adaptability in different environments.

detailed_description.heading: Effortless Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The nRAY is preconfigured for automatic connection, streamlining the setup process. This ensures that the included devices are ready to establish a secure and robust connection straight out of the box. Setting up the nRAY is as simple as point-and-power-on. This user-friendly process eliminates complexities, allowing users to effortlessly initiate the wireless connection without the need for intricate configurations. MikroTik goes the extra mile by providing a comprehensive kit to enhance user convenience. The package includes power supplies, PoE injectors, and a sophisticated pole-mount metal adapter known as solidMOUNT. The advanced pole mount metal adapter, solidMOUNT, is a standout feature of the nRAY. It allows for precise alignment, offering both vertical and horizontal adjustments.

detailed_description.heading: Unmatched Performance
detailed_description.text: The nRAY boasts a low maximum power consumption of just 6 W. Equipped with a Gigabit Ethernet port, the nRAY also maximizes bandwidth utilization. This feature enables users to experience seamless connectivity with high-speed data transfers. The Gigabit Ethernet port ensures that the device operates at full capacity, eliminating the bottlenecks commonly associated with less advanced alternatives. The nRAY's Gigabit Ethernet port goes beyond conventional capabilities, facilitating enhanced bandwidth utilization. This ensures that users can harness the full potential of their network's bandwidth, providing a smooth and efficient experience for data-intensive tasks.
